hero.title:
Where Luxury
Meets the City
hero.subtitle: Boutique apartment-hotel in the heart of Saigon, crafted for those who expect more.

rooms.title: Our Residences
rooms.subtitle: Each apartment is a sanctuary of calm, designed with purpose and finished with care.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: A contemporary open-plan studio with a private balcony — perfect for solo travellers or couples seeking comfort in the city.

twobed.name: 2-Bedroom
twobed.description: Spacious living meets panoramic city views. Ideal for families or business travellers who need room to breathe.

threebed.name: 3-Bedroom
threebed.description: The ultimate urban retreat. Generous space, sweeping skyline views, and a full kitchen — for those who settle for nothing less.

amenities.title: Curated Amenities
amenities.subtitle: Every detail considered. Every comfort provided.

checkin.label: Check-in 24/7
checkin.desc: Arrive at any hour — we are always ready.

balcony.label: Private Balcony
balcony.desc: Every residence has its own balcony.

location.title: In the Heart of Saigon
location.subtitle: 100 Cô Giang, Cầu Ông Lãnh, Ho Chi Minh City
location.description: Steps from Ben Thanh Market, surrounded by the city's finest dining, culture, and commerce. SOHO places you exactly where you want to be.
